_meta.description: 13档品质赛季固定难度表；GOAT赛季98-0后进入无常规赛/季后赛区分的概念神无限赛程。
_meta.runtimeRule: 按currentSeasonNumber读取seasonDifficultyBySeason；赛季难度不再由marketValueLevel决定，也不根据玩家阵容动态重算。
_meta.breakthroughDistanceRule: 失败停在当前场；强化后重打；98-0夺冠后赛季序号+1并进入下一品质难度。

scoreRules.teamRawScoreFormula: floor((teamScoringAttributeSum / activeRosterSize) * onCourtPlayerCount * scoringToPointsMultiplier * random(1 - scoringVolatilityPercent, 1 + scoringVolatilityPercent))

marginRules.marginFormula: ceil(max(1, winnerRawScore * (baseMarginPercent + ovrGapRatio * gapToMarginPercentMultiplier + random(0, randomMarginPercentMax))))

adForcedWin.eligibilityFormula: originalResult == loss && playerTeamOvr > opponentTeamOvr * 0.9 && playerTeamOvr < opponentTeamOvr * 1.1

_notes_regulationSeason: 常规赛82场逐一进行，不可跳过或扫荡；失败不计战绩并停在当前场，强化后重打；82胜0负后进入季后赛；每场约2秒动画
